overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along a mountain trail. The character encounters a horseback rider passing by, then climbs onto a large rock formation to overlook a scenic valley with pine forests and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with rocky outcrops and wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through grassy mountain terrain with rocky cliffs on the right

entered.detail: distant mountain range with rocky peaks under blue sky
large gray rocky cliff formation lining the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through grass and wildflowers
scattered evergreen trees on the left hillside
clusters of red wildflowers growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through a sunlit mountain valley. Rocky cliffs line the right side while pine trees dot the left hillside, with distant mountain peaks visible ahead. Red wildflowers grow alongside the path in the green grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with approaching horseback rider

events.description: rider on horseback approaches from ahead and passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a horse rider approaches and passes by in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse trotting toward the camera along the trail, passing by on the right

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a rider on a brown horse appears in the distance and trots past on the right side of the trail. The rocky cliff on the right draws closer while the pine trees on the left become more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail approaching large rock formation

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large flat rock formation at the end of the trail section

entered.detail: large flat-topped boulder formation at the trail's end suitable for climbing

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the trail as the rocky cliff on the right falls behind. A large flat rock formation comes into view ahead, growing larger as the character approaches. Pine trees on the left draw closer to the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: character climbs onto the large flat rock formation
view opens up to reveal expansive mountain valley from the elevated rock position

agents.ego_description: climbs onto the rock formation and stands looking out over the expansive valley below

entered.detail: expansive view of forested valley and distant mountain peaks with atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The character climbs onto the large flat rock, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the forested valley below and distant mountain peaks. Standing on the rocky summit, the camera surveys the expansive wilderness landscape with pine-covered slopes stretching into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that gradually ascends to a panoramic summit overlooking a vast wilderness. It begins with the character walking a winding dirt path through a sunlit valley, flanked by red wildflowers in green grass and distant mountain peaks. As the journey continues, a rider on a brown horse trots past on the right, while the surrounding rocky cliffs and pine trees draw closer to the trail. The scene then shifts as the cliffs fall behind and a large, flat rock formation emerges ahead, growing in scale as the character approaches. Finally, the camera climbs onto the rocky summit, expanding the view into a breathtaking panorama of forested slopes and distant peaks stretching across the horizon.
